title: Future Value Exam
intendedTensionBeat: The board offers several plausible clears, but only early ice investment keeps rescue order, dock, and water aligned.
intendedReleaseBeat: A mid-level ice break opens the pivot route and visibly converts pressure into control.
expectedPath: Identify the iced rescue route early, avoid broad low-value clears, break ice before water forces panic, then use a planned dock triple during the pivot.
expectedFailMode: Generic clearing delays the ice route, causing either dock overflow or water pressure before the first rescue is secure.
designNotes: Exam level: combine known ice, dock, water, and crate skills without adding vine or any new mechanic.
